1000:0000.name: memcpy_words_near
1000:0000.arguments: AX: src, BX: dst, DX: count_bytes
1000:0000.description: Copies words from source to destination using near pointers. Count is provided in bytes.

1000:0016.name: heap_validate_and_sweep
1000:0016.description: Validates the heap structure by checking for a magic value (0xBEAD) and then performs a sweep of the free lists.

1000:0e08.name: heap_free_block_internal
1000:0e08.description: Internal routine to free a memory block. Handles block coalescing, updates free lists, and adjusts global flags.

1000:17e8.name: heap_set_allocation_hook
1000:17e8.description: Sets a global allocation retry hook and returns the previously registered hook.

1000:1e73.name: heap_dispatch_error_handler
1000:1e73.arguments: p1: code, p2: sub, p3: v1, p4: v2
1000:1e73.description: Dispatches an error to the registered global heap error handler. Handles callback validation and reference counting.

1000:1f7e.name: heap_default_error_dialog_handler
1000:1f7e.description: Default error handler that displays a message box. Maps specific error codes to retry/abort dialog options.

1000:201c.name: heap_pool_cleanup_list
1000:201c.description: Iterates through a linked list of memory pools and destroys each one using internal cleanup routines.

1000:2068.name: heap_validate_pool_magic_internal
1000:2068.description: Internal helper to validate memory access and the 0xBEAD magic value for a pool header.

1000:206c.name: heap_is_valid_pool_ptr
1000:206c.description: Validates if a far pointer points to a valid memory pool by checking access and the 0xBEAD magic value.

1000:24ea.name: app_exit_wrapper
1000:24ea.description: A simple wrapper function that calls the Win16 application exit and cleanup routine.

1000:24fb.name: app_terminate_with_dos
1000:24fb.description: Terminates the application using Win16 and then falls back to a manual DOS 0x21 interrupt if necessary.

1000:25d2.name: stack_guarded_indirect_call
1000:25d2.arguments: p1: proc, p2: err, p3: res
1000:25d2.description: Executes an indirect call after verifying stack space. Triggers fatal exit on exhaustion.

1000:2891.name: fatal_runtime_error_handler
1000:2891.description: Handles fatal runtime errors by looking up messages, logging, and performing a fatal exit.

1000:3491.name: fmt_print_dispatch_logic
1000:3491.description: Dispatches formatted output based on a format character. Handles padding and zero flags.

1000:34cf.name: fmt_get_next_word_arg
1000:34cf.description: Retrieves the next word argument from the caller's stack frame and increments the arg pointer.

1000:34d8.name: fmt_get_next_dword_arg
1000:34d8.description: Retrieves the next double-word argument from the caller's stack frame and increments the arg pointer.

1000:34e6.name: fmt_get_arg_by_size_flag
1000:34e6.description: Retrieves an argument from the stack, choosing between word or dword size based on internal flags.

1000:3503.name: fmt_write_buffered_char
1000:3503.description: Writes a character to a buffered file handle, flushing the buffer on overflow.

1000:3534.name: fmt_write_buffered_string
1000:3534.description: Writes a string of characters to a buffered file handle in a loop.

1000:3552.name: fmt_write_padding_chars
1000:3552.description: Writes a character multiple times to a buffered handle, used for output padding.

1000:356e.name: fmt_itoa_internal
1000:356e.description: Internal routine for converting an integer to a string in a given base. Handles 16 and 32-bit values.

1000:359f.name: far_noop_stub
1000:359f.description: A far pointer no-op stub function.

1000:3722.name: dos_file_open_create_logic
1000:3722.arguments: p1: off, p2: seg, p3: mode, p4: act
1000:3722.description: A complex DOS-level file interaction routine that handles opening, creating, and locking files.

1000:3c51.name: global_realloc_guarded
1000:3c51.arguments: err: code, size: sz, p3: wrap
1000:3c51.description: A guarded wrapper for GlobalRealloc16 that performs error checking and triggers a fatal exit if reallocation fails.

1000:3cb7.name: memory_find_marker_fffe
1000:3cb7.description: Iterates through a custom memory structure or table to find the terminal 0xFFFE marker.

1000:3cd8.name: global_free_far_wrapper
1000:3cd8.description: A simple far pointer wrapper for the global memory free routine.

1000:4f1a.name: fatal_exit_wrapper
1000:4f1a.description: A wrapper for the fatal application exit and termination routine.

1000:4f20.name: error_sync_with_dos
1000:4f20.description: Synchronizes the internal error state with the result of a DOS interrupt call.

1000:4f54.name: file_error_sync_with_dos
1000:4f54.arguments: p1: r1, p2: r2, p3: err
1000:4f54.description: Synchronizes the file error state with DOS results, including validation for wildcard characters in filenames.

1000:5198.name: dos_multi_call_sync_error
1000:5198.description: Performs multiple DOS calls and synchronizes the final error state based on the composite results.

1000:5224.name: div_32bit_signed
1000:5224.description: Performs 32-bit signed division. Handles sign conversion and uses bit-shifting for long division.

1000:53f0.name: mod_32bit
1000:53f0.description: Performs 32-bit modulo operation using bit-shifting and division logic.

1008:016e.name: main_engine_initialization
1008:016e.description: Primary engine initialization routine. Validates the Windows environment, instantiates all core singleton managers, and creates the main application window and container.

1008:04f8.name: Simulator_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:04f8.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the Simulator class. Calls the destructor and optionally frees the memory.

1008:0536.name: UI_MainWindow_ctor
1008:0536.description: Constructor for the main application window. Sets the window vtable, loads icons and cursors, and initializes the application title and system colors.

1008:06c0.name: UI_Handle_Run_Turn_Command
1008:06c0.arguments: p1: app, p2: ticks, p3: res, p4: msg
1008:06c0.description: Handles the 'Run Turn' command from the UI. Executes the requested number of simulation ticks and synchronizes the UI state.

1008:0932.name: heap_global_sweep_all_pools
1008:0932.description: Performs a comprehensive sweep and validation of all specialized memory pools (Event, Component, Sprite, Timer, Entity).

1008:0984.name: UI_Refresh_Colors_and_Components
1008:0984.description: Refreshes system colors and triggers an update for the nested UI component at offset 0xE8.

1008:09ba.name: UI_Show_Main_Popup_Menu
1008:09ba.description: Loads the primary application popup menu ('OPPOPMENU') and displays it at the specified client coordinates.

1008:0a92.name: UI_Shutdown_Application
1008:0a92.description: Orchestrates the application shutdown sequence. Triggers cleanup for primary UI components and posts the quit message to the Windows event loop.

1008:1246.name: UI_Trigger_Child_Component_Event_4C
1008:1246.description: Triggers a virtual event callback (vcall 0x4C) on the primary nested UI component at offset 0xE8.

1008:37aa.name: UI_Window_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:37aa.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the base UI Window class. Resets vtables and optionally frees memory.

1008:37e4.name: UI_Window_Base_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:37e4.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the UI_Window_Base class. Calls the destructor and optionally frees the memory.

1008:3a10.name: far_noop_stub_1008
1008:3a10.description: A far pointer no-op stub function in segment 1008.

1008:3a14.name: UI_Window_dtor_Alt_Scalar_Deleting
1008:3a14.description: An alternative scalar deleting destructor for the base UI Window class.

1008:3a40.name: UI_GenericPanel_Step_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:3a40.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the generic panel's stepping state. Resets vtables and optionally frees memory.

1008:3a7a.name: UI_GenericPanel_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:3a7a.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the generic UI panel class. Calls the internal destructor and optionally frees memory.

1008:4426.name: Bitmap_Object_Ensure_Initialized
1008:4426.description: Ensures that a Bitmap_Object is fully initialized by checking and potentially loading its metadata and palette. Returns the combined palette and secondary metadata field.

1008:45d6.name: Bitmap_Object_Render_to_DC
1008:45d6.description: Renders a fully initialized Bitmap_Object to a Windows device context at the specified coordinates using the SetDiBitsToDevice16 API.

1008:4b5e.name: UI_Component_Get_Active_Resource_Ptr
1008:4b5e.description: Retrieves the active resource pointer from a UI component, potentially triggering a lazy initialization through a virtual callback if necessary.

1008:4c26.name: File_Object_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:4c26.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the File_Object class. Calls the destructor and optionally frees the memory.

1008:5634.name: UI_Element_WndProc_Dispatcher
1008:5634.description: Generic window procedure dispatcher for UI elements. Retrieves the C++ object pointer from window extra bytes and dispatches the message to a virtual event handler (vcall 0x1C).

1008:570e.name: UI_Window_dtor_Alt2_Scalar_Deleting
1008:570e.description: Another variant of the scalar deleting destructor for the base UI Window class.

1008:58a6.name: UI_Component_Add_Window_to_List
1008:58a6.description: Allocates a new UI component descriptor, initializes it as a window object, and appends it to the specified component list.

1008:593c.name: UI_Component_Append_Window_to_List
1008:593c.description: Allocates a new UI component descriptor and appends it to the tail of the specified component list.

1008:5ab8.name: UI_Component_Pop_Window_from_List
1008:5ab8.description: Removes the head element from a UI component list, destroys the node descriptor, and returns the pointer to the window object it contained.

1008:5b6e.name: UI_Window_dtor_Alt3_Scalar_Deleting
1008:5b6e.description: A third variant of the scalar deleting destructor for the base UI Window class.

1008:5b9a.name: UI_Control_Sub_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:5b9a.description: Scalar deleting destructor for UI control sub-components. Calls the internal destructor and optionally frees memory.

1008:5fa2.name: UI_Event_Manager_dtor_Scalar_Deleting
1008:5fa2.description: Scalar deleting destructor for the UI_Event_Manager class. Calls the destructor and optionally frees memory.

1008:62c0.name: UI_Window_OnPaint_Fill_Background
1008:62c0.description: A standard WM_PAINT handler that fills the window's client area with a solid background color.
